name: Creamy Stuffed Pasta Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the sausage into the casserole.
2. Add scallions and cook on high for three to four minutes.
3. Pour off excess fat.
4. Stir in chicken, sauteed mushrooms, crumbs, white wine, parsley, and celery salt until well combined.
5. Stuff 16 shells and place four in each gratin dish.
6. Pour Mornay Sauce over the shells.
7. Cover with plastic wrap and cook on high for seven to eight minutes, turning once.
8. Spoon sauce over pasta before serving.
9. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese, parsley, and paprika.
